audits.notes: date-fns parse/format functions return Invalid Date objects rather than throwing — the scanner checks for try-catch which is not the correct pattern for this library. The contract remains as documentation for isValid() usage. 0 violations in 73 repos suggests either the contract patterns aren't matching or developers are already handling invalid dates correctly.

contract_changes: Evidence confirmed: 580 violations across 47/74 repos (64% affect rate). format() dominates with 492 violations. Contract evidence_quality remains confirmed.
audits.notes: Major uptick in detected violations vs 2026-04-02 (0 → 580). Likely explanation: contract was significantly deepened between audits (2026-04-17, 2026-04-18, 2026-04-20, 2026-06-24 depth passes) adding format(), formatDistanceToNow(), parse(), and 13 other functions. The 2026-04-02 audit only had partial coverage. Spot-checked ghostfolio/ghostfolio (114 violations) — format() calls in chart-helper.ts and component files are genuinely unwrapped, confirming real violations not FPs. 0 FPs in 20-repo check. Top affected repos: ghostfolio/ghostfolio (114), keenthemes/reui (76), DouyinFE/semi-design (46), HospitalRun/hospitalrun-frontend (35), BoostIO/BoostNote-App (34).
